item.title: The idea that it is somehow a crime to be offended when you shouldn’t be offended while learning a significant political lesson ...
item.description:
The idea that it is somehow a crime to be offended when you shouldn’t be offended while learning a significant political lesson from it is a right wing psy op

This is a shorter discussion of leftist engagement with imperial systems but point is, we ain’t telling u to vote, we r just focusing on what chooses who you GET to vote for

item.title: THEY GLORIFY IT
item.description:
THEY GLORIFY IT. They would LOVE for their man to go to Gaza. They fetishize a IDF husband. Do not let people trick you
